resource_type.description: Type of resource: download_local, download_external, external_purchase, fileless

description_attachment_key.description: API attachment key for description images

version_attachment_key.description: API attachment key for version file. Required for download_local type.

external_download_url.description: External download URL. Required for download_external type.

currency.description: Currency code. Required for external_purchase type.

external_purchase_url.description: Purchase URL. Required for external_purchase type.
